prompt: Create a vertical fantasy anime illustration of Kanon, a traveling young alchemist walking toward the viewer through a narrow medieval stone alley at dusk after rain. She has blonde hair in two long braids, wears a dark navy cap with large blue headphones over it, a loose off-white tunic shirt, baggy dark trousers, rugged brown lace-up boots, and a flowing deep blue traveler’s cloak fastened at the neck. Her face is hidden by a flat opaque square censor block in a muted brown tone. In her left hand she carries a warm glowing brass lantern, and across her body is a leather satchel containing exactly two visible potion vials, one blue and one green. Beside her floats exactly one small round companion robot, white and gray with a glossy black face panel and two cyan glowing eyes. The setting is an old European fantasy town with rough stone walls, timber roofs, distant towers, wet cobblestones, puddle reflections, misty blue evening atmosphere, and several warm wall lanterns receding into the background. Use cinematic lighting with strong contrast between cool blue twilight and golden lantern glow, painterly detailed brushwork, soft depth of field, moody adventurous atmosphere, full-body composition, centered character, no text.
